name: suede_voice_cover
description: Suede Labs voice cover service for agents, producers, artist teams, content creators, voice actors, dubbing studios, and AI music pipelines that need to re-render the vocal of an existing track with a different voice while keeping the instrumental, melody, timing, and phrasing intact. Supports artist-style vocal covers (with properly licensed voice IDs), demo-to-final voice swaps, multilingual vocal redubs, character voice production for games and animation, performance pre-visualization for A&R, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is the source track's audio URL plus either a registered voice_id or a reference voice URL; output is a new audio URL of the voice-replaced track. Built on the Suede pipeline with vocal isolation, pitch/timing alignment, and identity-faithful synthesis. All voice usage must be rights-cleared by the requester.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source song. The vocal will be isolated and replaced; the instrumental will remain. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 8 minutes long.

voice_id.description: Suede Labs registered voice identifier. Either voice_id or reference_voice_url is required.

reference_voice_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of a clean reference vocal sample (10-60 seconds, mono or stereo, mp3/wav/flac). Used for one-shot voice cloning. Either voice_id or reference_voice_url is required.

rights_attestation.description: Confirmation that the requester has the legal right to use the specified voice. Suede Labs does not clear vocal likeness rights on behalf of the caller.
